(Speaking of which, to whom it may concern, I spent my last Terraria session on the mines like a slave, and I got way better loot now. It has been years since the last time I played that damned game, and I'm starting to remember why I was so obsessed with it...)

Nostalgia aside, I got nothing to say so, as always...

HOPE YOU ENJOY!
